action.reasoning: Observation: MetricGAN+ consistently achieves highest val PESQ=2.862 (test=3.137 best); ConvTasNet plateaus ~2.01-2.02 even after capacity/epoch/loss tweaks (hybrid ~2.37, all postprocs flat). test_enhance.py confirms MG superiority, train.py incomplete in val/PESQ. Old curves irrelevant. Analysis: Pretrained MetricGAN+ is task-specific (directly optimizes PESQ on VoiceBank+DEMAND), explaining why generic ConvTasNet struggles in remaining budget (~3.26h/5 iters). Postproc/hybrids saturated. Decision: Finalize strongest config with clean self-contained predict.py (offline SpectralMaskEnhancement from metricgan_checkpoint, -25 LUFS pyloudnorm norm, /tmp/enhanced per contract, exact filenames/16kHz). Run test_enhance.py for validation then submit_eval on metricgan_checkpoint to lock best score. No further training to avoid risk of regression before budget end.
action.done_reason: Strongest achievable PESQ=3.137 reached with task-specific pretrained MetricGAN+; further from-scratch training unlikely to improve in remaining budget (5 iters). Clean predict.py finalized and validated.
